title: 20:39 ГўВҖВ” October 13, 2020
body_text:
20:39 ГўВҖВ” October 13, 2020
Update to the CPS Admin Application Part
Throughout the CPS Admin Application Part, we removed references to biometrics and, where appropriate, added references to 2-step security tokens. WeГўВҖВҷll continue to update other content to reflect the decommissioning of biometric devices. The CPS Admin Appointment Certificate, Form 1918, and the CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035, were updated in September as part of this initiative.
Throughout the Part, weГўВҖВҷve highlighted the connectedness between the CPS Admin application and the User Management application.
Secure Site Users are displayed in both systems and changes can be made in either CPS Admin or User Management, with some exceptions. Specifically, you canГўВҖВҷt manage tokens in CPS Admin, and you canГўВҖВҷt manage ГўВҖВңrealmsГўВҖВқ in User Management.
CPS Admin Security Officers can also delete and modify other CPS Admin Security Officers via the User Management application, with some exceptions.
These two user management applications are currently running parallel, but if you use the User Management application, youГўВҖВҷll have an upgraded user experience and you can manage most of your CPS Admin Security OfficersГўВҖВҷ changes.
Access and Administration
CPS Admin Application Part
Section 1.1, Overview of the Secure Site and CPS Admin
We better explained how the CPS Admin and the User Management applications are connected.
Section 2.1, Terminology
We provided updated definitions of CPS Admin Security Officer, Secure Site, and Step-up Authentication.
Section 2.2, Frequently Asked Questions
We added Question 1, updated content in other FAQs, and removed obsolete content.
Section 3.3, Policy on Passwords
WeГўВҖВҷd previously communicated that after 13 months of inactivity, Secure Site Users and CPS Admin Security Officers are disabled. After a further 90 days, CentralВ 1 will delete the userГўВҖВҷs account. We added clarification that once deleted, the account can be recovered for up to 90 days.
Section 4.1, Overview of CPS Admin Security Officer Management
We added clarity to this section.
Section 4.2, Adding a CPS Admin Security Officer
We noted that Central 1 must process all requests for new CPS Admin Security Officers (you canГўВҖВҷt do this yourself via the User Management application).
We also updated the procedure for completing the CPS Admin Appointment Certificate, Form 1918, and updated the image of the form.
Section 4.3, Modifying or Deleting a CPS Admin Security Officer via CentralВ 1
We noted that there are two ways to manage your CPS Admin Security Officers. You can either send a written request to CentralВ 1 to make a change on your behalf, or you can make the change directly on the User Management application.
We specified what you can manage directly (via User Management) and what you must send to CentralВ 1.
We also updated the procedure for completing the CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035, and updated the image of the form.
Section 6.4, Viewing, Copying, Modifying, and Deleting Templates
We consolidated the information on each of these functions into one section.
